rule_hits.summary: Reviews query expansion and document expansion techniques, emphasizing the unique contributions of leveraging LLMs for query expansion and comparing with related work like HyDE...
Lists references cited in the paper, covering a range of topics from information retrieval techniques to large language models and related research.
Details the experimental setup and main results, showing significant improvements in both in-domain and out-of-domain retrieval tasks when using query2doc with BM25 and dense re...
